# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-user-uploads"
    DependsOn: [IAMPolicy]

  IAMPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: S3PolicyForApplication
      Roles:
        - Ref: ApplicationRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"

  ApplicationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
